title: NRP1_01_ImagePlate_Coating
steps: iMatrix-511 Silk (892 021) stored at 4C. Found in the mini iPSC refrigerator. Record Lot # of iMatrix found on side of box.
Print labels on the Brady Label Printer. Label information should include: FIW###P##
Large label should be placed on bottom right corner of 384 or 96 well plate lid. Small labels should be placed on right corners of the actual plates.
384 Well Example of Label Placement
Prepare diluted stocks of iMatrix for corresponding plates by diluting in DPBS -/-.
iMatrix dilution factors: 384 Wells= 1:60
iMatrix dilution factors: 96-wells= 1:100
7500ul of a 1:60 dilution is needed for a single 384 well plate.
1200ul of a 1:100 dilution is needed for a single 96 well Ab plate.
Prepare in a 15mL conical.
For a 1:100 dilution you will need 1200ul of DPBS -/- to 12ul iMatrix.
Prepare in a 15mL conical. For a 1:60 dilution you will need 7500ul of DPBS -/- to 125ul iMatrix.
Manually dispense 100ul of 1:100 diluted iMatrix stock per well into 96 well Revvity 96 well optical plate using Integra 1250 pipette on repeat.
Pour entire contents of 1:60 iMatrix dilution 15mL conical into Integra reservoir.

The following items are needed to stage the Biomek deck prior to running the program: 1 x 96 well iMatrix plate prepared in the section above 1 x Labeled 384 well plate 1 x Empty Axygen tip box 1 x Box of sterile Axygen 250ul tips FX-250-L-R-S
96 well plate incubated at 37C,5% CO2 for 1hr prior to cell seeding.
Using the Integra 1250 pipette on repeat, dispense 300ul per well into 96 well plate.
Label plate: 1:60 iMatrix source
Into wells A1-A12, B1-B12.
Wipe down Biomek deck with Kimtech wipe and 70% Ethanol.
Stage Biomek deck with items from Step 13 in accordance with the corresponding deck layout protocol detailed below.
To run protocol, on the biomek PC, Open Biomek Software. Go to File -> Open "Coat_384Well_FullPlate" (should also be in recents).
Protocol name: Coat_384Well_FullPlate. Once initiated, program will dispense 17ul of 1:60 iMatrix into every well of 384 well plate. Run time is approximately 2 minutes.
On top-left, you should see the steps the script will take. If you need to add more or less coating media, click "finalWellVolume" and change the value.
When you're ready, hit the green arrow to run the protocol.
384 well plate incubated at 37C, 5% CO2 for 1hr prior to cell seeding.
Ensure that enough media is stocked for the amount of plating that will be done
Locate weekly plating schedule in FMD to determine how many 384 and 96 well plates are needed. FIVE Master Data "NRP PlateTracker"
Copy the Template Folder Structure Template and Rename it for the PlateID being worked on Template Folder: R:\FIVE\EXP\FIW103\P999\ Contents of Template Folder
creator: William J Buchser
